title: rubus × biaui
intro: Rubus × biaui, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the yellow raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the autumn-fruiting raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × biaui include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus × biaui include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
